title: Gadget Lab
description: Gadget lab adds in lots of gadgets and gizmos to make your playthrough just a bit more fun
body:
Welcome to Gadget Lab, your ultimate source for utility-based enhancements in Minecraft! With Gadget Lab, the possibilities for convenience and innovation are endless. This mod introduces a diverse selection of gadgets tailored to streamline your adventures, amplify your building projects, and fortify your survival skills.

## Features:

- **Display Pedestal:** Elevate your collection to new heights with the Display Pedestal. Showcase prized possessions, rare artifacts, or decorative items with elegance and flair.
- **Rebreather:** Delve into the depths of the ocean fearlessly with the Rebreather. Enjoy extended underwater exploration without the hassle of constantly resurfacing for air.
- **Portable Crafting Table:** Craft anytime, anywhere with the Portable Crafting Table. Unleash your creativity on the go, whether you're building, repairing, or crafting essential items.
- **Enigmatic Hold:** Capture and transport mobs effortlessly with the Mob Capturing Device. Gather companions, study creatures, or secure protection with ease.
- **Gravity Boots:** Defy gravity and traverse challenging terrain with ease using the Gravity Boots. Jump higher, fall slower, and explore elevated landscapes with confidence.
- **Teleportation Wand:** Master instantaneous travel with the Teleportation Wand. Seamlessly teleport to desired locations for swift escapes or efficient exploration.
- **Smoke Bomb:** Confound adversaries and create diversions with the Smoke Bomb. Envelop your surroundings in smoke for strategic escapes or tactical maneuvers.

## Future Plans:

Gadget Lab is continuously evolving! Stay tuned for forthcoming updates, including:
- Additional gadgets catering to various playstyles and preferences.
- Integration with other popular mods to enhance compatibility and broaden gameplay possibilities.
- Community-inspired features and enhancements based on player feedback and suggestions. Check out [this link](https://github.com/NicosaurusRex99/Gadget-Lab/blob/1.20/ideas.txt) for a detailed list of ideas.

Elevate your Minecraft experience with Gadget Lab's ingenious gadgets. Download the mod today and unlock a world of convenience and innovation!
